title: Vantage Airport Group's acquisition of FSM Management Group Inc. and AvEnergy Management Services Inc.
content:
## Vantage Airport Group's acquisition of FSM Management Group Inc. and AvEnergy Management Services Inc.
On January 2, 2026, Vantage Airport Group Ltd. ("Vantage Group") acquired FSM Management Group Inc. (“FSM”) and AvEnergy Management Services Inc. ("AvEnergy"). FSM, on behalf of airline partners, develops, constructs and manages airport infrastructure required to supply of jet fuel and de-icing services in airports across Canada. AvEnergy provides aviation energy logistic services. The transaction aligns with Vantage Group's strategic objectives and further enhances its expertise and capabilities in critical aviation infrastructure and sustainable energy solutions. As the aviation industry continues to adapt to shifting market demands, Vantage Group's extensive development, operational and energy capabilities will enable expanded service offerings across its network of airport and airline partnerships.
Vantage Group is a global leader in airport and transportation investment, development, management, and advisory services.
McCarthy Tétrault assisted Vantage Group with a team led by Jody Aldcorn that included Glynnis Morgan, James Lin, Benjamin Rivard, Dinah Holliday, Liam Peet-Pare, Sandra Belton, Cathy Wilson (Corporate), Donovan Plomp, Lyann Danielak, Grace McDonell, Francis Racine (Labour and Employment), Julia Miller (Pensions and Benefits), Vincent Yip (Intellectual Property), Selina Lee-Andersen (Environment), Jeremy Ho, Fred Purkey, Simon Douville, Darren Chung Hubert Cadotte (Tax).
